message:
Running command: # Wait for librelane to finish (check every 3 min, timeout 3h)
WRAPPER_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"
LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"
LR_PID=214817

echo "Waiting for PID $LR_PID to complete..."
while kill -0 $LR_PID 2>/dev/null; do
  STEP=$(ls -td "$WRAPPER_DIR/runs/wrapper_run/"[0-9]* 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs basename 2>/dev/null)
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Still running | step=$STEP | log_lines=$LINES"
  sleep 180
done

echo ""
echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LibreLane PID $LR_PID has exited."
echo "--- Last 30 lines of log ---"
tail -30 "$LOG"

message.content: LibreLane (PID 214817) is still running — Yosys is deep in synthesis processing the hazard3 decoder. This is expected for a full-chip SoC with RISC-V CPU. Waiting for it to advance.
